general.name: mos_target_targeting_generation_parquet
general.description: List of SDSS-V targeting generations. A 'targeting_generation' describes a collection of versioned cartons, together with their robostrategy control parameters. This is a convenient way to describe the specific set of carton-versions that were used (and the way that they were treated) within any particular run of robostrategy. The dr20_targeting_generation table contains all targeting_generations that were considered for observations in the timespan covered by the dr20 data release. In addition, we include the 'v0.5.3' targeting_generation since this was the version released as part of dr20. During the initial plate operations phase of SDSS-V, we did not use the robostrategy code to assign fibers to targets. However, for completeness, the 'v0.plates' pseudo-targeting_generation has been reverse engineered in order to describe the set of carton-versions that were considered during that phase. The dr20_targeting_generation table can be joined to the dr20_carton table via the dr20_targeting_generation_to_carton table. To associate a targeting_generation with a robostrategy plan, join dr20_targeting_generation to dr20_targetdb_version via the dr20_targeting_generation_to_version table. Taken together, the dr20_targeting_generation, dr20_targeting_generation_to_carton and dr20_targeting_generation_to_version tables duplicate, in a database form, the robostrategy carton configuration information available via the rsconfig product (https://github.com/sdss/rsconfig).
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_targeting_generation.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

pk.description: primary key for this table entry

label.description: A human-readble name for the targeting_generation
